name: Oyster & Spinach Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the oysters from their shells and place them in a blender.
2. Add a small amount of water or milk to the blender with the oysters, then blend until smooth.
3. Pour the blended oyster mixture into a saucepan containing the pureed spinach, milk, half-and-half, MSG (if using), garlic salt, A-1 sauce, and butter.
4. Heat the soup gently over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until warmed through but not boiling.
5. In a small bowl, mix 2 teaspoons of cornstarch with 1 teaspoon of cold water to create a slurry.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the soup, then continue heating for about 15 minutes or until thickened.
7. Off heat, gently whisk the whipping cream until light and frothy.
8. Ladle the hot soup into four ovenproof bowls.
9. Top each bowl with a generous amount of whipped cream.
10. Place under an oven broiler (set to low) just until the whipped cream forms a golden pool on top of each serving.
